mapper.select: SELECT wo.order_num, wo.order_id AS work_order_id, wo.plan_num, pp.plan_qty, pp.plan_id, pp.item_num, wo.order_status AS work_status, wo.emp_num, wo.current_qty, wo.content, wo.created_at, wo.order_start, wo.order_end, e.ename, i.name AS item_name, i.code, i.type FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN emp e ON wo.emp_num = e.emp_num LEFT JOIN production_plan pp ON wo.plan_num = pp.plan_num LEFT JOIN item i ON pp.item_num = i.item_num WHERE wo.order_id = #{work_order_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'WO-' || LPAD(WO_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO work_order (order_num, order_id, order_qty, order_status, emp_num, plan_num, current_qty, content, created_at, order_start, order_end) VALUES ( WO_SEQ.CURRVAL, #{work_order_id}, #{order_qty}, '대기', #{emp_num}, #{plan_num}, 0, #{content}, SYSDATE, #{order_start}, #{order_end} )
